nasb.text: So Saul sent messengers to Jesse and said, “Send me your son David who is with the flock.”

esv.text: Therefore Saul sent messengers to Jesse and said, “Send me David your son, who is with the sheep.”

cnv.text: 於是掃羅派遣使者去見耶西，說：“請你叫你放羊的兒子大衛到我這裡來。”

ccb.text: 扫罗便差遣使者去见耶西，说：“请让你放羊的儿子大卫到我这里来。”
